final:
module top_module(input [3:0] a, input [3:0] b, output reg [3:0] sum);// Changed sum to output reg
    wire [4:0] overflow_adjusted_sum;
    
    assign overflow_adjusted_sum = a + b;
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (overflow_adjusted_sum > 15) begin
            sum = overflow_adjusted_sum - 16; // sum can now be assigned
        end
        else begin
            sum = overflow_adjusted_sum; // sum can now be assigned
        end
    end
endmodule
